title: HM Treasury: ministerial gifts, hospitality, overseas travel and meetings, July to September 2024
body: "HM Treasury publishes details of ministers’ gifts (given and received), hospitality received, all overseas travel, and meetings with external individuals and organisations every quarter.  The new Ministerial Code has set out that from 5 July 2024 onwards, Ministers’ gifts and hospitality data will be published by the Cabinet Office as part of a central register. As such, this publication includes data on gifts and hospitality from 1 to 4 July 2024, as well as Ministers’ overseas travel and meetings from July to September 2024. "
